response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership, fintech-specific expertise, or a proven track record in scaling engineering teams or architecting production-grade multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in event-driven systems, microservices, and real-time data processing.
Contributions to AI-agent tooling and frameworks (e.g., MCP code generators) show relevant exposure to agentic workflows.
Strong open-source and full-stack development experience, including observability and developer tooling.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments (e.g., fintech).
Fintech exposure is limited to pricing optimization and investment platforms, not core infrastructure like credit systems or real-time risk modeling.
